metodos.codigoOriginal:
Local lcEdn, loCnx

lcEdn = Padr(ThisForm.pcEmps, 3) + Padr(ThisForm.pcDopes, 20) + Str(ThisForm.pcNumes, 6)
loCnx = ThisForm.poDataMgr

* Campos Usados Do SigCdPam
loCnx.CursorQuery([SigCdPam], [LocalParam], .f., .f., [CGruEstPs])
Go Top In LocalParam
If Eof([LocalParam])
	Return .f.
EndIf

* Campos Usados Do SigCdEmp
* RazSocs	= Razão Social
* Razas	    = Nome
* Endes		= Endereço
* Numeros   = Número
* Bairs     = Bairro
* Cidas     = Cidade
* Estas     = Estado
* Ceps      = CEP
loCnx.CursorQ... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcPmt

lcPmt = Iif(InList(ThisForm.pcTpImp, 2, 4), [], [Prompt])

Report Form SigReIiv To Printer &lcPmt. NoConsole

If (ThisForm.chkListagem.Value = 1) && Imprimir Listagem
	Select crInvoices
	Go Top

	Report Form SigReIpk To Printer &lcPmt. NoConsole
EndIf

lcArq = Sys(2023) + [\SigReIiv_*.jpg]
Delete File &lcArq.
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Lparameters pEmp, pDop, pNum, pImp 

With ThisForm
	.pcEmps     = pEmp
	.pcDopes    = pDop
	.pcNumes    = pNum
	.Caption    = [Impressão de Invoice (] + Alltrim(pDop) + [/] + Alltrim(Str(pNum)) + [)]
	.pcTpImp    = Iif(Type([pImp])=[N], pImp, 0)
	.ContaEmail = Space(10)

	.poDataMgr = CreateObject([fSqlConector], .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		Set Point To [,]
		Set Separator To [.]

		lcQuery = [Select Expressao, Traducao ] + ;
					[From SigCdDic ] + ;
				   [Where Idioma = 'INGLES  ... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcArq

ThisForm.poDataMgr.Release

Set Point To [.]
Set Separator To [,]

=DoDefault()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Report Form SigReIiv Preview NoConsole

If (ThisForm.chkListagem.Value = 1) && Imprimir Listagem
	Select crInvoices
	Go Top

	Report Form SigReIpk Preview NoConsole
EndIf

lcArq = Sys(2023) + [\SigReIiv_*.jpg]
Delete File &lcArq.
* Fim **************************************************************************************
